---
title: Deep learning for denoising high-rate global navigation satellite system data
date: '2023-01-01'
author: [Amanda Thomas, Diego Melgar, Sydney N Dybing, Jake Searcy]
publication: Seismica, **1** (2023).
categories: [environment]
url_source: 'https://seismica.library.mcgill.ca/article/view/240'
url_preprint: ''
journ: Seismica
issue: 1
page: ''
year: 2023
image: ''
pub_number: 11
---
